emails.subject: Lunch on Monday
emails.body: Lunch on Monday Your scheduled to have lunch on Monday with Prentice Hotte. Is there any place special you would like to go, so I can let Janice know. Thank you, Ricki

emails.subject: Re: Lunch on Monday
emails.body: Re: Lunch on Monday Somewhere convenient to Jim since he has to come from Beltway/EOTT. Will he come down Wetheimer? If so we can meet at Highland Village Grotto is it? Or if he comes down I-10n then -------------------------- Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Lunch on Monday
emails.body: RE: Lunch on Monday Janice told me that he would be in the office today. Would The Met be OK? Thanks, Ricki To: Winters, Ricki

emails.subject: RE: Lunch on Monday
emails.body: Met sounds good To: Corman, Shelley
